mapper.select: SELECT ms.id, ms.movie_id AS movieId, m.title AS movieTitle, ms.actor_id AS actorId, a.name AS actorName, a.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, ms.role, ms.character_name AS characterName, ms.order_index AS orderIndex FROM movie_staff ms LEFT JOIN actor a ON ms.actor_id = a.id LEFT JOIN movie m ON ms.movie_id = m.id WHERE ms.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY CASE ms.role WHEN '导演' THEN 1 WHEN '编剧' THEN 2 WHEN '主演' THEN 3 WHEN '配角' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, ms.order_index DESC

SELECT ms.id, ms.movie_id AS movieId, m.title AS movieTitle, ms.actor_id AS actorId, a.name AS actorName, a.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, ms.role, ms.character_name AS characterName, ms.order_index AS orderIndex FROM movie_staff ms LEFT JOIN actor a ON ms.actor_id = a.id LEFT JOIN movie m ON ms.movie_id = m.id WHERE ms.actor_id = #{actorId} ORDER BY m.release_date DESC

SELECT ms.id, ms.movie_id AS movieId, m.title AS movieTitle, ms.actor_id AS actorId, a.name AS actorName, a.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, ms.role, ms.character_name AS characterName, ms.order_index AS orderIndex FROM movie_staff ms LEFT JOIN actor a ON ms.actor_id = a.id LEFT JOIN movie m ON ms.movie_id = m.id WHERE ms.movie_id = #{movieId} AND ms.role = #{role} ORDER BY ms.order_index DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO movie_staff (movie_id, actor_id, role, character_name, order_index) VALUES
( #{item.movieId}, #{item.actorId}, #{item.role}, #{item.characterName}, #{item.orderIndex} )
